title: Redcurrant Kessim
description: A nutty and chewy Ethiopian dish featuring redcurrants, pickles, and dairy-free-friendly accompaniments for meal prep.
instructions: Soak cashews in water for at least an hour.
Blend redcurrants, pickled vegetables, soaked cashews, sesame seeds, almond meal or gluten-free flour with coconut oil until it forms a dough-like consistency.
Grease a baking dish and spread the mixture evenly over the bottom and sides of the dish.
Bake for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown. Allow it to cool slightly before serving.
Optional: Serve with yogurt or tahini sauce for extra flavor.
